gate.title: Workflows are restricted
gate.description: You need the workflow:read permission to view automation for this application.
gate.manageDescription: You need the workflow:manage permission to configure workflows.

tab.title: Workflows
tab.subtitle: Automate provisioning when access is granted or revoked for this application.

empty.title: No automation configured
empty.description: Grants for this application are recorded only — nothing is provisioned automatically.

onFailureHint.STOP: Mark the run failed, alert, and stop. The grant is never touched.
onFailureHint.ESCALATE: Pause the run and open a manual task so a person can complete it, then resume.
onFailureHint.COMPENSATE: Run a designated compensation step (e.g. undo a half-finished change), then stop.
onFailureHint.CONTINUE: Ignore the failure and proceed. The run is still marked partially failed.

connection.title: Connection
connection.none: No automation configured — grants are recorded only.
connection.deleteDescription: Delete the connection "{name}"? Workflows using it will stop provisioning.

connectionForm.description: How lazyit reaches this system, and with what credential.
connectionForm.kindImmutable: The type can't be changed — recreate the connection to change it.
connectionForm.signatureHeaderHint: The header the HMAC signature is sent in (the signing secret is stored separately).

errors.invalidFields: Please check the fields and try again.

connectionTest.hint: A read-only check — it never provisions.

secret.writeOnlyHint: Stored encrypted and never shown again — you can only replace it.

list.title: Workflows
list.stepCount: {count, plural, =0 {No steps} one {# step} other {# steps}}

runs.title: Recent runs
runs.emptyDescription: When this app's workflows fire on a grant or revoke, their runs appear here.

runRetry.toastSuccess: Run re-queued from the failed step.

runDetail.title: Run
runDetail.subtitle: The executed path through the workflow, step by step.
runDetail.noSteps: This run has no recorded steps yet.
runDetail.notFoundDescription: This run may have been removed, or you don't have access to it.

dryRun.title: Test run (dry-run)
dryRun.description: Preview the would-be requests and the path through this workflow against a real grant. Nothing is sent and nothing is provisioned.
dryRun.bannerHint: No requests were sent and nothing was provisioned.
dryRun.noSteps: This version has no steps to preview.
dryRun.noGrants: No active grants to sample — grant someone access to this application first.
dryRun.sampleGrantHint: The grant whose context the requests resolve against.
dryRun.simulateHint: Force one step to fail to preview its failure edge (escalate / compensate / stop).
dryRun.wouldPause: The run would pause here for a manual task.

builder.subtitle: A connection and an error-handling sequence of steps.
builder.namePlaceholder: e.g. Provision Jira on access granted
builder.triggerImmutable: The trigger can't be changed — recreate the workflow to change it.
builder.connectionMissing: No connection configured — add one on the Workflows tab.
builder.connectionRequired: Add a connection before adding an API or webhook step.
builder.noSteps: No steps yet — add one to start the sequence.
builder.invalidSteps: Some steps are incomplete — open each flagged step and fix it.
builder.notFoundDescription: This workflow may have been removed, or you don't have access to it.

mapping.valueSourceHint: Pick a context field, compose one from several, or switch to Advanced to edit the raw JSON.
mapping.jsonHint: Edit the whole mapping as JSON. Type a token opener to insert a context token.

compose.empty: Add a token or some text to compose this value.

stepEditor.title: Configure {kind} step
stepEditor.description: How this step runs, what counts as success, and what happens on failure.
stepEditor.pathTokenHint: Relative to the connection's base URL. Insert a token to put a value in the route, e.g. a user id in /users/…/deactivate.
stepEditor.tokenUnbalanced: Unbalanced braces — a token was opened but not closed.
stepEditor.tokenUnknownRoot: Unknown token source: {roots}. It won't resolve at run time.
stepEditor.tokenUnknownFilter: Unknown filter: {filters}. It will be ignored at run time.
stepEditor.promptPlaceholder: What the person needs to do.
stepEditor.inputFieldsHint: The typed inputs the person provides.
stepEditor.optionsEmpty: No choices yet — add the values this dropdown offers.
stepEditor.mappingHint: Map lazyit context into the outbound payload.
stepEditor.successCriteriaHint: Comma-separated. Leave empty for the 2xx default.
stepEditor.retryHint: Retry transient failures before the on-failure edge fires.
stepEditor.invalid: Some fields are invalid — please check them.

inbox.title: Manual tasks
inbox.subtitle: Provisioning steps that need a person to act.
inbox.emptyDescription: Pending manual tasks across all applications appear here.

taskAction.title: Manual task
taskAction.subtitle: Complete the step, then resume the run.

resolvedStatus.COMPLETED: This task has already been completed.

taskAction.failReasonPlaceholder: Why are you failing this run?
taskAction.failReasonHint: Only used if you choose Fail run.
taskAction.noPermission: You don't have permission to act on this task.
taskAction.notFoundDescription: This task may have been resolved, or you don't have access to it.
taskAction.toastSubmitted: Task submitted — the run will resume.
